plugins.name: skillfetch
plugins.description: Manage synced AI skill instructions from external GitHub repos — security-scanned, diff-previewed, with local annotations that survive updates.

plugins.name: claude-token-guard
plugins.description: Cut token burn on every session — blocks expensive Explore/Plan agents and rewrites verbose Bash commands to token-efficient equivalents.

plugins.name: claudekit
plugins.description: Cross-session memory for Claude Code — auto-summarises every session into SQLite, injects context on start. Includes TUI (claudekit) to manage tools.
